provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, young woman with impossibly large eyes and bright pink hair in a skin-tight white and purple space suit with decorative fins and flowing ribbons, exaggerated hourglass proportions, a tiny impractical laser pistol, knee-high heeled boots with no mag-locks, sparkling particle effects around her, the outfit prioritizes visual appeal over any functional purpose
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Same anime aesthetic. Bright colors, impractical design.
